ocr_findings.description: The image shows an icon label '出所' rendered correctly in OCR as '説明'; minor label substitution for the URL citation icon, no meaning loss.

reviewer_notes: Classic chapter-title page: large chapter number '第10章', large title 'コンピュータシステム', short intro paragraph, bullet point list, and a position table. Body text is introductory/navigational only. chapter_title is correct. OCR faithfully reproduced all text; table structure preserved.
